description: Translate Beginner's guide sections from Increasing Hacking Level through Creating a New Script to Access Cloud Servers.
scope: Beginner's guide mid section: hacking level, editing the hacking script, and cloud server purchase script setup. Code block comments are intentionally preserved.

verification.expectedVisualChange: Beginner's guide sections from Increasing Hacking Level through cloud server script setup should render in Korean while commands, filenames, API names, and code block comments remain unchanged.
knownRemaining: Additional Sources of Income and later Beginner's guide sections remain for the next patch.
Code block comments are intentionally preserved for a later optional pass.
